comments: Integration with their ERP has stalled, blocked on their own IT team and the procurement team wants a multi-year pricing commitment Overall a healthy relationship worth investing in.

Support tickets have dropped since the last release, sentiment is improving while their finance lead keeps pushing back on the renewal amount Overall a healthy relationship worth investing in.
